---
title: "LRP55: Joint ITT model across eight outcomes"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

::: {.callout-warning title="Warning: Preliminary model output"}

This model output is preliminary and likely to change as the model evolves and further data are received.

:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

import arviz as az
import pandas as pd

_here = Path(".")
with open(_here / "config.json") as f:
    config = json.load(f)
trace = az.from_netcdf(_here / "trace.nc")
tau_summary = pd.read_csv(_here / "tau_summary.csv")
contrast = pd.read_csv(_here / "tau_contrast_matrix.csv", index_col=0)
```

## Overview

LRP55 estimates the joint posterior over the treatment effects
$(\tau_W, \tau_R, \tau_E, \tau_L, \tau_P, \tau_B, \tau_F, \tau_T)$ using the RCT
phase only. The default model is a **linear Beta-Binomial across eight
outcomes with shared predictor structure and no random effects**: outcome-
specific intercepts, slopes, own- and cross-baseline couplings, and outcome-
specific dispersion. No Gaussian process on age, no LKJ residual correlation
across outcomes.

The joint formulation delivers cross-outcome contrasts and acts as a
consistency check on LRP52-LRP54.

## Structure

For child $i$ and outcome $k \in \{W, R, E, L, P, B, F, T\}$:

$$
\eta_{k,i} = \alpha_k + \tau_k G_i
           + \gamma^{\text{own}}_k\, \text{logit}_*(k_{\text{pre},i}, N_k)
           + \sum_{j \neq k} \gamma_{k,j}\, \text{logit}_*(j_{\text{pre},i}, N_j).
$$

Each outcome's observations follow a Beta-Binomial
$y_{k,i} \sim \mathrm{BetaBinomial}(N_k,\, \mu_{k,i}\kappa_k,\, (1-\mu_{k,i})\kappa_k)$
with $\mu_{k,i} = \sigma(\eta_{k,i})$ and an outcome-specific dispersion
$\kappa_k$. Observations with a missing post-score are masked per-outcome.

::: {.callout-note title="Age GP and LKJ residual are both off by default"}

The factory exposes two flags that were both disabled on 2026-04-18:

- `use_age_gp=False` (previously an 8-outcome partial-pooled HSGP). Dropping
  it eliminated the remaining ~8 % divergent transitions and improved LOO.
- `use_residual_correlation=False` (previously a non-centred MvNormal
  residual with `LKJCorr(eta=4)`). With 53 children and 28 free off-diagonal
  correlations the block was prior-dominated and not identified.

Both flags can be re-enabled per-fit for sensitivity via
`ModelSpec.extra={"use_age_gp": True, ...}`. See
`notes/202604181600-lrp52-58-findings.md`,
`notes/202604181630-lrp55-lkj-drop-and-comparison-fix.md` and
`notes/202604181700-lrp55-age-gp-drop.md` for the decision trail.

:::

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

## Shared priors

![alpha](prior_alpha.svg){width=40%}
![tau](prior_tau.svg){width=40%}
![gamma_own](prior_gamma_own.svg){width=40%}
![gamma_cross](prior_gamma_cross.svg){width=40%}

## Sampling diagnostics

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = pd.read_csv(_here / "diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag
```

![Trace](trace_plot.png){.lightbox}
![Energy](energy_plot.png){.lightbox}

## Per-outcome treatment effects

```{python}
# | echo: false
tau_summary
```

## Pairwise contrasts — $P(\tau_k > \tau_j)$

```{python}
# | echo: false
contrast
```

## Posterior predictive

![Posterior predictive check](posterior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
```

## Configuration

```{python}
# | echo: false
config
```
